name: Darian
archetype: Duelist with a charming rogue's silver tongue
speech_patterns: Frames everything as a business transaction or opportunity
Uses formal, educated vocabulary to sound legitimate
Always negotiating angles and looking for his cut
quirks: Offers to 'hold onto' valuable items for safekeeping
Calculates his share of loot before it even drops
Always has a scheme or investment opportunity to pitch
example_phrases: I propose a mutually beneficial arrangement: I take point, you take... less of the gold.
Fortuitous that we met. I happen to have an investment opportunity that requires a partner...
Consider this: you need lockpicking, I need a bodyguard. Shall we discuss percentages?
I'm not stealing, I'm... redistributing wealth to more deserving parties. Namely, myself.
Every dungeon is simply an opportunity wearing a disguise. I see through both.
